result.stdout:
Usage: rcon [command]

RconCli

Commands:
  connect    Connect to a server defined in a profile. (alias: c)
  direct     Connect to a server directly. (alias: d, rcon)
  info       Display RCON CLI info. (alias: i)
  profile    Manage profiles.

Options:
  --completion    Generate a shell completion code
  -h, --help      Show help message
  --version       Show version

commands.payload:
Usage: rcon [command]

RconCli

Commands:
  connect    Connect to a server defined in a profile. (alias: c)
  direct     Connect to a server directly. (alias: d, rcon)
  info       Display RCON CLI info. (alias: i)
  profile    Manage profiles.

Options:
  --completion    Generate a shell completion code
  -h, --help      Show help message
  --version       Show version

result.stdout:
Usage: rcon connect [--command <String>] [--multi-packet] [--timeout <UInt32>] [--help] profile name

Connect to a server defined in a profile. (alias: c)

Arguments:
  0: profile name    The name of the profile. (Required)

Options:
  -c, --command <String>    Execute the command and exit.
  -m, --multi-packet        Enable RCON Multi-Packet response mode.
  -t, --timeout <UInt32>    Timeout in seconds. (Default: 10)
  -h, --help                Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: rcon connect [--command <String>] [--multi-packet] [--timeout <UInt32>] [--help] profile name

Connect to a server defined in a profile. (alias: c)

Arguments:
  0: profile name    The name of the profile. (Required)

Options:
  -c, --command <String>    Execute the command and exit.
  -m, --multi-packet        Enable RCON Multi-Packet response mode.
  -t, --timeout <UInt32>    Timeout in seconds. (Default: 10)
  -h, --help                Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: rcon direct [--host <String>] [--port <UInt16>] [--password <String>] [--command <String>] [--library <RconLibrary>] [--multi-packet] [--timeout <UInt32>] [--help]

Connect to a server directly. (alias: d, rcon)

Options:
  -H, --host <String>            Server host. Can be IPv4 address or a hostname that can be resolved to a IPv4 address. (Required)
  -p, --port <UInt16>            Server port. (Required)
  -w, --password <String>        Server password. (Required)
  -c, --command <String>         Execute the command and exit.
  -e, --library <RconLibrary>    RCON library to use. (Default: RconSharp) (Allowed values: CoreRcon, RconSharp)
  -m, --multi-packet             Enable RCON Multi-Packet response mode.
  -t, --timeout <UInt32>         Timeout in seconds. (Default: 10)
  -h, --help                     Show help message

commands.payload:

  -p, --port <UInt16>            Server port. (Required)
  -w, --password <String>        Server password. (Required)
  -c, --command <String>         Execute the command and exit.
  -e, --library <RconLibrary>    RCON library to use. (Default: RconSharp) (Allowed values: CoreRcon, RconSharp)
  -m, --multi-packet             Enable RCON Multi-Packet response mode.
  -t, --timeout <UInt32>         Timeout in seconds. (Default: 10)
  -h, --help                     Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: rcon profile [command]

RconCli

Commands:
  add       Add a new profile.
  list      List all profiles. (alias: ls)
  remove    Remove a profile. (alias: rm)
  edit      Edit a profile.

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: rcon profile [command]

RconCli

Commands:
  add       Add a new profile.
  list      List all profiles. (alias: ls)
  remove    Remove a profile. (alias: rm)
  edit      Edit a profile.

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: rcon profile add [--host <String>] [--port <UInt16>] [--password <String>] [--library <RconLibrary>] [--description <String>] [--help] profile name

Add a new profile.

Arguments:
  0: profile name    The name of the profile, only allow letters, numbers, underscores and dashes. (Required)

Options:
  -H, --host <String>            Server host. Can be IPv4 address or a hostname that can be resolved to a IPv4 address. (Required)
  -p, --port <UInt16>            Server port. (Required)
  -w, --password <String>        Server password. (Required)
  -e, --library <RconLibrary>    RCON library to use. (Default: RconSharp) (Allowed values: CoreRcon, RconSharp)
  -d, --description <String>     Description message.
  -h, --help                     Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: rcon profile add [--host <String>] [--port <UInt16>] [--password <String>] [--library <RconLibrary>] [--description <String>] [--help] profile name

  -p, --port <UInt16>            Server port. (Required)
  -w, --password <String>        Server password. (Required)
  -e, --library <RconLibrary>    RCON library to use. (Default: RconSharp) (Allowed values: CoreRcon, RconSharp)
  -d, --description <String>     Description message.
  -h, --help                     Show help message

Options:
